description: Polling email listener: fetches new messages from an IMAP mailbox and fires the trigger for each one. v1 scaffold — pollAction is a placeholder pending an IMAP transport (the executor only supports HTTP today).
credentialGuide:
1. Ask your email provider (or IT admin) for the IMAP server hostname (e.g. `imap.gmail.com`) and port (usually 993 for SSL).
2. If your account has two-factor authentication enabled, generate an app-specific password instead of using your regular password (for Gmail: [myaccount.google.com/apppasswords](https://myaccount.google.com/apppasswords)).
3. Enter the server, username, and password below. Leave Folder blank to use the default INBOX.

configSchema.label: IMAP server
configSchema.helpText: Hostname of the IMAP server (e.g. imap.gmail.com).

actions.description: Placeholder pollAction. v1 returns an empty list until an IMAP transport is wired into the integration-action-executor.
